source_name: Medexa Internal - Saudi Claim Validation Policy

derived_from.source_name: NPHIES Healthcare Financial Services Implementation Guide

records.description: Claims must carry payer and member identity before submission workflows are attempted.
Billable diagnosis and procedure codes must come from licensed or officially maintained KSA-compatible code systems.
If the service family requires prior authorization, a pre-authorization reference or documented payer exception must be present.
Encounters with high-cost or exception-driven services should carry supporting clinical documentation metadata for later exchange.
Path A may detect services in real time, but claim submission must remain disabled until all mandatory regional routing and coding inputs are complete.
